full_text:
Cao De 曹德
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao De (曹德)was born in Pei. Brother of Cao Cao. Killed by Zhang Kai with his father Cao Song. Cao De was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and the Wei Kingdom. Cao De lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
